appraisal_events.evidence: Elle laissa pleuvoir sur moi la lumière de son regard bleu... pencha en avant son corps, qui se redressa rapidement... Ainsi agissait-elle sous le feu des regards de Robert de Saint-Loup qui... faisait à distance des efforts désespérés pour obtenir un peu plus encore de sa tante.
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator frames the duchess as a figure who dispenses favor and attention, with Robert striving to extract 'a little more' from her, which locally elevates her social authority despite the slightly mocking description of her posed gestures.

status_effects.explanation: She appears as the arbiter of attention whose favor others (notably Robert) work to secure, which locally heightens her standing in the scene.
